evidence: Representative protein, mRNA, and ribosomal-subunit cargo objects include Blender location keyframes on separate transport windows.
NPC_GatePulse_Controller includes a keyed gate_pulse custom property that can drive gate emphasis during cargo crossing.
Static duplicate cargo markers along the paths make import/export direction visible in review renders.
remaining_risks: The current keyframes are source-art timing cues, not a finalized Roblox runtime animation system.
Path-follow interpolation should be rebuilt as Roblox tweens or spline samples.
Review-only direction arrows should be toggleable in Roblox.
required_fixes_before_export: Convert route points into an animation_event_map entry before Roblox import.
Validate that all animated cargo origins remain stable after mesh export.
